title: Frequently Asked Questions
description: Answers to common questions about education, careers, and planning. Find quick answers to 'Can I...?' questions you might have.
target_audience: Anyone with questions about education or careers
questions_it_answers: Can I do engineering without JEE?

What if I don't do well in board exams?
